g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Metastore in Unity Catalog?')
g.text: top level container — one per region

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Catalog in Unity Catalog?')
sendPrompt('What is a Schema in Unity Catalog?')

svg.text: Catalog = one floor of the library
Schema = one bookshelf on that floor
Table = one book on the shelf
Volume = a folder of files on the shelf
View = a photocopy of selected pages
